title: neckeria campestris
intro: Neckeria campestris, also known as the Field Horsetail, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the family Equisetaceae. Traditionally, Neckeria campestris has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat urinary issues, kidney stones, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Neckeria campestris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
